The_State_Of_Jharkhand_vs_Nishkant_Dubey.case_name: The State Of Jharkhand vs Nishkant Dubey
The_State_Of_Jharkhand_vs_Nishkant_Dubey.description: The State of Jharkhand is the appellant, while Dr. Nishkant Dubey and others are the respondents. The core legal dispute is about the quashing of a First Information Report (FIR) registered against the respondents under various sections of the Indian Penal Code and the Aircraft Act, with the High Court of Jharkhand at Ranchi holding that the FIR was lodged mala fide and would amount to an abuse of law if proceedings continued. The Supreme Court upheld the High Court's decision to quash the FIR.
